touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Liam Becker at DeltaForm expressing interest in call recording and coaching capabilities. Initial inquiry about features and pricing for sales team.
Follow-up email sent with product overview and available time slots for qualification call. Highlighted call recording, AI transcription, and coaching workflow features.

Qualification call with Liam to understand current state and needs. DeltaForm currently using Fireflies but looking for more robust coaching features. Sales team of 19 needs better conversation intelligence and manager review workflows.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to look at alternatives to Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Fireflies is good for transcription but lacks the coaching and performance analytics our managers need.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce and our existing call tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native Salesforce integration and work with all major conferencing platforms.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with discovery questionnaire and additional resources on coaching features. Asked about current tech stack and decision-making process.
Follow-up email confirming demo date and agenda. Liam mentioned he'd like to include one of his sales managers in the demo to evaluate coaching workflows.

questions_asked.question: Can we see the custom scorecards feature during the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, we'll walk through how managers can build custom coaching criteria.

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up email. Demo went well with positive feedback on coaching workflows. Liam evaluating internally and comparing with Fireflies renewal pricing.

Proposal call to present pricing for 19 seats with automations plus consulting package. Discussed implementation timeline and training for sales managers. Liam mentioned budget approval process requires VP Finance sign-off.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package versus standard onboarding?
questions_asked.answer: Consulting includes custom playbook development, scorecard setup, and quarterly strategy sessions with our customer success team.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in the evaluation from your side?
questions_asked.answer: I'll need to loop in our VP of Finance for budget approval, but I'm driving the decision.

objections: Price is higher than Fireflies renewal - need to justify the delta

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with formal proposal and ROI analysis comparing feature set and manager time savings versus Fireflies. Included customer case studies from similar-sized sales teams.

Negotiation call to discuss pricing feedback. Liam requested 15% discount to match Fireflies pricing more closely. Discussed contract terms and implementation timeline. Still single-threaded - VP Finance hasn't joined evaluation.

questions_asked.question: Can you offer any flexibility on pricing to help me get this across the line?
questions_asked.answer: We can explore options - what budget range works for your team?

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful to have our team present the ROI directly to your VP of Finance?
questions_asked.answer: Let me get back to you on that - I want to socialize internally first.

objections: 15% discount requested to align with budget expectations
Need faster decision from finance team

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting scheduled, but VP Finance did not attend - only Liam and one sales manager present. Discussed implementation plan and success metrics. Liam still advocating internally but mentioned Fireflies counteroffer came in lower than expected.

questions_asked.question: If we move forward, how quickly can we get the team trained and live?
questions_asked.answer: Implementation takes 2-3 weeks with full training and custom scorecard setup included.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a clear yes for you and your finance team?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly, if you can get closer to the Fireflies pricing, that would make the business case much easier.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the consulting package - could we start with standard and add later?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure it that way, though you'd lose some of the bundled discount.

next_steps: Revise proposal with adjusted package options
